project: Server-side for the ShopAll app (startup from scratch)
description: An app that lets a user search for specified products across all major e-stores such as eBay, Best Buy, etc. Development of the server-side part (API) for Android and iOS applications. Parsing of internet shops via API and development of a web scraper for retrieving data from web portals. Internally the project is built so that new shops can be added easily. On this project I developed my own scraper for websites (Chrome plugin + PHP backend with Linux chrome-driver). I also configured all AWS servers from scratch.
technologies: Linux chrome driver for DOM parsing
APIs: eBay, Etsy, Newegg, Tesco, Walmart, Best Buy, Amazon
Ubuntu 16 (setup: Nginx + php-fpm + Redis + PostgreSQL + Elasticsearch + chrome driver)
team: 4 persons (1x PM; 1x Backend dev, DevOps; 1x iOS dev; 1x Android dev)
